title: Python Execution, Tools, and Evidence
description: Build and diagnose a small command-line learning log across REPL, script, editor, and terminal workflows. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a reproducible command-line learning log while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Run Python code predictably in interactive and script contexts.
Read tracebacks and collect evidence before changing code.
Use formatting, documentation, source control, and environment records from the first program.
